title: Simon Willison: Gemini 3.1 Flash TTS
summary: Simon Willison notes the availability of Gemini 3.1 Flash TTS, Google's new expressive AI speech model.
why_included: This is a brief mention of Google's Gemini 3.1 Flash TTS release from a third-party observer, noting its availability.

title: Google AI Blog: Gemini 3.1 Flash TTS
summary: Google's Gemini 3.1 Flash TTS, a new generation of expressive AI speech, is now available across Google products.
why_included: Google is releasing a new TTS model, Gemini 3.1 Flash TTS, indicating advancements in AI speech generation technology.

title: OpenAI Updates Agents SDK
summary: OpenAI has updated its Agents SDK with native sandbox execution and a model-native harness to help developers build secure, long-running agents.
why_included: This is a significant update to OpenAI's Agents SDK, introducing features that improve security and development capabilities for agents.

title: Claude Code Releases: v2.1.108
summary: Anthropic's Claude Code v2.1.108 release introduces prompt caching, a recap feature, slash command discovery via the Skill tool, and various improvements to error messages, memory footprint, and existing commands.
why_included: This is a significant update to Anthropic's Claude Code tool, introducing new features and improvements that enhance user experience and functionality.

title: OpenAI Expands Trusted Access for Cyber Defense with GPT-5.4-Cyber
summary: OpenAI is expanding its Trusted Access for Cyber program by introducing GPT-5.4-Cyber to vetted defenders, enhancing safeguards for AI cybersecurity capabilities.
why_included: OpenAI is launching a specialized model, GPT-5.4-Cyber, for cybersecurity defense, indicating a focus on domain-specific AI applications.

title: Claude Code Releases: v2.1.105
summary: Anthropic's Claude Code v2.1.105 release includes support for PreCompact hooks, background monitors for plugins, improved stalled API stream handling, and better network error messages.
why_included: This is a notable update to Anthropic's Claude Code tool, adding new features and improving existing functionalities like API stream handling.

title: Cloudflare Integrates OpenAI's GPT-5.4 and Codex into Agent Cloud
summary: Cloudflare is integrating OpenAI's GPT-5.4 and Codex into its Agent Cloud, enabling enterprises to build and scale AI agents for real-world tasks.
why_included: This partnership between Cloudflare and OpenAI brings OpenAI's advanced models to Cloudflare's enterprise platform, indicating broader adoption and integration of AI in business workflows.

title: Claude Code Releases: v2.1.101
summary: Anthropic's Claude Code v2.1.101 release includes a /team-onboarding command, OS CA certificate store trust by default, and improved error messages for rate limits and tool unavailability.
why_included: This release of Anthropic's Claude Code tool introduces a new onboarding command and enhances security and error handling.

title: OpenAI Responds to Axios Developer Tool Compromise
summary: In response to the Axios supply chain attack, OpenAI is rotating macOS code signing certificates and updating apps, confirming no user data was compromised.
why_included: This is an important security update from OpenAI addressing a supply chain attack, which, while not directly impacting user data, signals a need for vigilance in the software supply chain.

title: Claude Code Releases: v2.1.98
summary: Anthropic's Claude Code v2.1.98 release introduces an interactive Vertex AI setup wizard, Perforce mode for edit failures, a Monitor tool, and subprocess sandboxing.
why_included: This update to Anthropic's Claude Code includes significant new features like a Vertex AI setup wizard and enhanced security measures like subprocess sandboxing.

title: Claude Code Releases: v2.1.97
summary: Anthropic's Claude Code v2.1.97 release adds a focus view toggle, a refreshInterval status line setting, syntax highlighting for Cedar policy files, and hardened Bash tool permissions.
why_included: This release of Anthropic's Claude Code tool introduces a new focus view, enhances security in Bash permissions, and adds syntax highlighting.

title: Anthropic SDK Python: v0.92.0
summary: Anthropic's Python SDK has been updated to v0.92.0, adding support for Claude Managed Agents.
why_included: This SDK update from Anthropic includes support for a new product feature, Claude Managed Agents.

title: Claude Code Releases: v2.1.96
summary: Anthropic's Claude Code v2.1.96 release fixes an issue with Bedrock requests failing with 403 'Authorization header is missing' when specific environment variables are set.
why_included: This is a bug fix release for Anthropic's Claude Code, addressing a specific authentication failure that was a regression from a previous version.

title: Simon Willison: Anthropic's Project Glasswing Restricts Claude Mythos
summary: Simon Willison comments on Anthropic's Project Glasswing, which restricts Claude Mythos access to security researchers, deeming it a necessary measure.
why_included: This is a third-party commentary on Anthropic's strategic decision to restrict access to Claude Mythos, indicating a focus on responsible AI deployment.

title: Anthropic SDK Python: v0.90.0
summary: Anthropic's Python SDK has been updated to v0.90.0, adding support for the 'claude-mythos-preview' model and fixing a bug related to query parameters.
why_included: This SDK update from Anthropic adds support for a new model and fixes a bug, indicating ongoing development and improvements.

title: Simon Willison: Cleanup Claude Code Paste
summary: Simon Willison provides a brief note on cleaning up Claude Code paste functionality.
why_included: This is a brief, low-impact mention of a cleanup effort related to Claude Code's paste functionality from a third-party observer.

title: Google AI Blog: Gemini API Pricing Tiers
summary: Google is introducing Flex and Priority inference tiers to the Gemini API to balance cost and latency for developers.
why_included: This is a high-impact update from Google introducing new pricing tiers for its Gemini API, offering more flexibility for developers to manage costs and performance.

title: OpenAI Codex Offers More Flexible Pricing for Teams
summary: OpenAI's Codex now includes pay-as-you-go pricing for ChatGPT Business and Enterprise, offering teams a more flexible option for adoption.
why_included: This is a high-impact pricing change from OpenAI, making their Codex product more accessible to teams through flexible pay-as-you-go options.

title: Google AI Blog: Veo 3.1 Lite Video Generation Model
summary: Google is making its most cost-effective video generation model, Veo 3.1 Lite, available in paid preview through the Gemini API and for testing in Google AI Studio.
why_included: Google is releasing a new, cost-effective video generation model, Veo 3.1 Lite, expanding its multimodal AI offerings.

title: OpenAI Raises $122 Billion in New Funding
summary: OpenAI has raised $122 billion in new funding to expand frontier AI globally, invest in next-generation compute, and meet growing demand for its products.
why_included: This is a significant funding round, indicating substantial investment and confidence in OpenAI's future growth and capabilities.

title: Google AI Blog: Gemini 3.1 Flash Live Speech Model
summary: Google's Gemini 3.1 Flash Live, a speech model focused on natural and reliable audio AI, is now available across Google products.
why_included: Google is releasing a new speech model, Gemini 3.1 Flash Live, indicating advancements in AI-powered audio generation.

title: Google AI Blog: Lyria 3 Music Generation Model
summary: Google is making its newest music generation model, Lyria 3, available in paid preview through the Gemini API and for testing in Google AI Studio.
why_included: Google is releasing a new music generation model, Lyria 3, expanding its capabilities in creative AI.

title: OpenAI Launches Safety Bug Bounty Program
summary: OpenAI is launching a Safety Bug Bounty program to identify AI abuse and safety risks, including agentic vulnerabilities and prompt injection.
why_included: OpenAI is proactively addressing AI safety by launching a bug bounty program, demonstrating a commitment to identifying and mitigating potential risks.
